violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

Sliced cheese and veggie burgers were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were observed on top of pans in prep unit #2. Food items shall not be loaded above the fill line of unit in order to maintain temperature control. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles labeled with common name during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the cold drawers of prep unit #2 and the front bar cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
